books.title: Scarlet Sister Mary
books.author: Julia Peterkin
books.summary: A young woman struggles to choose between living as a member in good standing in the church or embracing a life of sin and pleasure.

books.title: The Four Feathers
books.author: A. E. W. Mason
books.summary: A young man sets off to regain his honor after his resignation from the military on the eve of deployment brands him a coward.

books.title: Struggles and Triumphs
books.author: P. T. Barnum
books.summary: The world’s greatest showman tells the story of his life.

books.title: Eminent Victorians
books.author: Lytton Strachey
books.summary: Four witty and biting biographies of Victorians that take aim at the moral superiority of their subject’s time.

books.title: A Little Princess
books.author: Frances Hodgson Burnett
books.summary: A young girl discovers a life of unexpected challenges when she goes to live at a London boarding school.

books.title: The Cherry Orchard
books.author: Anton Chekhov
books.summary: A heavily indebted landowner and her family return to Russia in an attempt to save her estate from being auctioned off.

books.title: Macbeth
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: An ambitious general murders the King of Scotland and takes the throne for himself—and then he must deal with the consequences.

books.title: Beyond Thirty
books.author: Edgar Rice Burroughs
books.summary: A young naval officer finds himself in a forbidden part of the world after storms waylay his ship.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Fyodor Sologub
books.summary: A collection of Fyodor Sologub’s translated short stories, ordered by date of the publication of their translation.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Henry Kuttner
books.summary: A collection of short fiction by Henry Kuttner, ordered by date of original publication.

books.title: The Life of Buffalo Bill
books.author: William F. Cody
books.summary: The 1879 autobiography of William F. Cody, more commonly known as Buffalo Bill, detailing his early life in the American West.

books.title: The Powerhouse
books.author: John Buchan
books.summary: A secret criminal organization is uncovered after an M.P.’s friend goes missing.

books.title: Religion and the Rise of Capitalism
books.author: R. H. Tawney
books.summary: A tracing of the development of religious thought from the Middle Ages to the dawn of the Industrial Revolution.

books.title: The New State
books.author: Mary Parker Follett
books.summary: The theory of group organization is formulated and applied in an attempt to design a truly democratic political state.

books.title: The Kalevala
books.author: Elias Lönnrot
books.summary: The Finnish national epic poem recounting the creation of the Earth and the adventures of its mythical heroes.

books.title: Jack Keefe Stories
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A boastful, nearly illiterate major league pitcher writes a series of letters home detailing the goings-on in his life and career.

books.title: A Strange Manuscript Found in a Copper Cylinder
books.author: James De Mille
books.summary: A shipwrecked sailor travels through a portal to a lost world populated by fantastic creatures and a strange civilization.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Frederik Pohl
books.summary: A collection of science fiction stories by Frederik Pohl ordered by date of publication.

books.title: The Everlasting Man
books.author: G. K. Chesterton
books.summary: G. K. Chesterton takes us through the history of man, rebuking common secular views and presenting the case for the Catholic Church.

books.title: With the Empress Dowager of China
books.author: Katharine A. Carl
books.summary: A female painter becomes the court artist of the Empress Dowager of China.
